source_pr.title: *:support aggregate function push cross outer join.
source_pr.body:
Like "select sum(b.c) from a left join b on a.id = b.id", It can be rewrited as "select sum(agg_0) from a left join (select sum(c), id from b group by id) b on a.id = b.id". But instead of null padding, we shoule set sum(c)'s default value as 0.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala @XuHuaiyu PTAL

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select count(*), b.d from t a left join t b on a.c = b.d group by b.d order by b.d") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select count(*), b.d from t a left join t b on a.c = b.d group by b.d order by b.d") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select count(*), b.d from t a left join t b on a.c = b.d group by b.d order by b.d") (executor/aggregate_test.go)

files: executor/aggregate_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/executor.go, expression/aggregation.go, expression/expression.go, plan/aggregation_push_down.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plans.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/plan_test.go, plan/predicate_push_down.go
